allow: Bash(sed -i 's/val \(targetYaw, targetPitch\) = computeYawPitch\(player\\.x, eyeY, player\\.z, waypointX, eyeY, waypointZ\)/val \(targetYaw, targetPitch\) = computeYawPitch\(player.x, eyeY, player.z, waypointX, waypointY + 0.62, waypointZ\)/' "$FILE")

Bash(sed -i 's/val \(lookYaw, lookPitch\) = computeYawPitch\(player\\.x, eyeY, player\\.z, targetX, eyeY, targetZ\)/val \(lookYaw, lookPitch\) = computeYawPitch\(player.x, eyeY, player.z, targetX, targetY + 0.62, targetZ\)/' "$FILE")
